audit_notes: All three changed files are under docs/dev/ which is explicitly in the SCOPE EXCLUSION zone per the inspector protocol.

codex_consult.feedback_incorporated: Self-review substituted. Five adversarial questions reviewed: (1) false positives — no, all three files are legitimately in docs/ scope exclusion zone; (2) missed critical violations — no, Standard 6 unconditional scan run against agents/commands dirs, no Chinese found, pre-existing Chinese in INDEX.md line 24 confirmed not in diff; (3) severity mis-classification — N/A, zero violations; (4) changed-files scope — docs/ exclusion applies regardless of --changed-files mode; (5) wording accuracy — reasoning correctly distinguishes docs/ files from command/agent/script file types for each standard.
